# Martin's Moving
> Precision Relocation Experts. Family-owned moving company serving Bradenton, Sarasota, and Manatee County, Florida since 2004. Licensed, bonded, and insured (Florida Mover Registration #IM595).

Phone: (941) 809-5777
Email: martinsmoving2002@aol.com
Hours: Mon-Fri: 8:30am - 5:30pm (24/7 emergency service)
Service area: Bradenton, Sarasota, and Manatee County
Awards: Bradenton's Best 2021, Bradenton's Best 2022, Best of SRQ 2025

## Moving services
- [Residential Moving](https://martinsmovers.com/services/residential-moving)
- [Commercial / Office Moving](https://martinsmovers.com/services/commercial-moving)
- [Local Moving](https://martinsmovers.com/services/local-moving)
- [Interstate Movers](https://martinsmovers.com/services/interstate-movers)
- [Professional Packing](https://martinsmovers.com/services/professional-packing)
- [Piano Movers](https://martinsmovers.com/services/piano-movers)
- [Specialty & Difficult Items](https://martinsmovers.com/services/specialty-items)
